# redis_hash (Resource)

Manages a Redis hash (`HSET`). On update, fields removed from the configuration are deleted with `HDEL`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "redis_hash" "example" {
  key = "user:42"
  fields = {
    name  = "Alice"
    email = "alice@example.com"
    role  = "admin"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fields` (Map of String) A map of field names to string values for the hash.
- `key` (String) The Redis key.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The Redis key, used as the resource identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import redis_hash.example "user:42"
```
